digest.en: Oil prices jumped above $117 following reports of an extended Iran blockade. The development comes as Iranian currency hits a new low amid US sanctions. Alphabet investors are pushing for safeguards on the use of its cloud and AI technology.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रम्प ने हाल ही में एक फोटो पोस्ट की जिसमें वह राइफल के साथ दिखाई दे रहे हैं। ट्रम्प ने ईरान को धमकी देते हुए कहा कि उन्हें जल्दी समझदार बनना होगा। इस बीच, भारतीय विदेश मंत्री एस जयशंकर ने इक्वाडोर की विदेश मंत्री से बातचीत की।

articles.title: Oil price jumps above $117 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
articles.summary: Crude oil prices rose above $117 following reports of an extended blockade on Iran. The surge is linked to ongoing uncertainty over the Middle East conflict. The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.

articles.title: Israeli 'double-tap' strike kills three rescue workers in Lebanon, officials say
articles.summary: An Israeli strike in Lebanon killed three rescue workers, officials reported. The attack was part of successive strikes that targeted a Hezbollah commander, killing nine people. They are among nine people killed in successive attacks on Tuesday, which Israel's military says targeted a Hezbollah commander.

articles.title: Iran’s currency falls to new low as US blockade, sanctions impact trade
articles.summary: Iran's currency hit a new low amid US sanctions and a blockade impacting trade. The war affected trade with major partners, including China and the UAE. The war has affected trade with some of Iran's largest partners, including China and the UAE.

articles.title: Alphabet investors push for safeguards on use of its cloud, AI tech
articles.summary: Alphabet investors are pushing for safeguards on the use of its cloud and AI technology. They seek assurances on responsible deployment. Alphabet investors push for safeguards on use of its cloud, AI tech.

articles.title: US Supreme Court hears Haiti, Syria TPS case with wide-ranging implications
articles.summary: The US Supreme Court heard a case on Temporary Protected Status for Haiti and Syria. A ruling could impact 1.3 million people and determine if Trump can terminate the status.

articles.title: Uber taps Expedia to add hotel bookings in super app push
articles.summary: The US Supreme Court is hearing arguments on whether the Trump administration can revoke temporary protected status for hundreds of thousands of Syrians and Haitians, who have been shielded from deportation due to safety concerns in their countries. The court's decision could have significant implications for these immigrants.

articles.title: Trump warns Iran better 'get smart soon' and accept nuclear deal
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump has warned Iran to accept a nuclear deal or face continued economic pressure, including a blockade of its ports. Trump reportedly intends to pursue this strategy until Tehran dismantles its nuclear program.

articles.title: US supreme court weighs whether protected status of Haitians and Syrians can be revoked
articles.summary: The US Supreme Court is considering whether the Trump administration has the authority to strip hundreds of thousands of immigrants of temporary protected status, a program that has shielded them from deportation due to safety concerns in their countries. The court heard oral arguments on Wednesday.

articles.title: US Fed chief nominee Warsh clears key confirmation hurdle in Senate
articles.summary: The US Senate has cleared a key confirmation hurdle for Federal Reserve chief nominee Kevin Warsh, paving the way for his potential appointment to the central bank's leadership. Warsh's nomination still requires further approval from the Senate.

articles.title: //news.sky.com/story/ukraine-war-latest-eu-formally-approves-ukraine-loan-teenagers-hired-for-school
articles.summary: The European Union has formally approved a loan for Ukraine, amid ongoing conflict in the country. The loan is intended to support Ukraine's economy, with teenagers among those hired to help implement the loan program.

articles.title: Bangladesh Enters Nuclear Era As 2,400-MW Power Plant Begins Fuel Loading
articles.summary: Bangladesh's Rooppur nuclear power plant began fuel loading, marking a significant milestone. The 2,400-MW project was contracted on December 25, 2015, and is set to enter the nuclear era. The Rooppur project is being executed under a general contract signed on December 25, 2015.

articles.title: Greetings from Syria, where a postwar olive harvest offers a long-lost taste of home
articles.summary: Residents of a Syrian village in the Homs countryside gathered olives, rediscovering a taste of home after 14 years of civil war. The warm sun and harvest brought a sense of normalcy.

articles.title: ‘We saw terrible things’: Mali refugees tell of atrocities amid attacks
articles.summary: Thousands of Malians fled their country due to assaults by several groups, including the army. Refugees reported witnessing atrocities during the attacks. Thousands of Malians have been forced to flee their country as several groups, including the army, assault them.

articles.title: Suspect arrested after two Jewish people stabbed in London
articles.summary: A suspect was arrested after stabbing two Jewish people in London's Golders Green area. The incident occurred in a neighborhood with a large Jewish population. The incident took place in the British capital's Golders Green area, home to a large Jewish population.

articles.title: South Africa deports Mugabe’s son for unrelated offences after employee shot at family home
articles.summary: South Africa deported Robert Mugabe's youngest son, Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe, after he pleaded guilty to immigration and firearms-related offences. He was also fined.

articles.title: Israeli strike kills five family members in Lebanon
articles.summary: An Israeli strike in Lebanon killed five family members. The incident occurred in an area with rising tensions between Israel and Lebanon. Local authorities reported the strike's aftermath. Israeli strike kills five family members in Lebanon.

articles.title: Sri Lanka mass grave excavation in Chemmani to resume under diplomatic presence
articles.summary: Excavation of a mass grave in Sri Lanka's Chemmani will resume under diplomatic presence, after being paused in September due to rains and pending funds approval from the Ministry of Justice. The work had stalled, but will now continue.

articles.title: World Boxing allows Russian, Belarusian boxers to compete as neutrals
articles.summary: World Boxing will allow Russian and Belarusian boxers to compete as neutrals, without national flags, anthems, logos, or uniforms. Athletes from both countries will participate under a neutral identity in World Boxing events.

articles.title: SPIAccolades . April 2026 - Princeton School of Public and International Affairs
articles.summary: The Princeton School of Public and International Affairs recognized SPIAccolades in April 2026. Details of the accolades are not specified. April 2026 Princeton School of Public and International Affairs. April 2026 - Princeton School of Public and International Affairs.

articles.title: Oil prices rise despite UAE exit from OPEC as Iran war ceasefire hangs in balance
articles.summary: Oil prices rose despite the UAE's exit from OPEC, as a potential ceasefire in the Iran war hangs in the balance. The UAE's departure from OPEC did not lead to a decrease in oil prices.

articles.title: Iran war squeezes India's pharma supply chain
articles.summary: Iran's war is disrupting India's pharmaceutical supply chain, causing higher energy and freight prices, and reliance on Chinese active pharmaceutical ingredients is squeezing margins, raising the risk of higher drug prices and potential shortages.

articles.title: ट्रम्प की राइफल के साथ फोटो, ईरान को धमकी दी: बोले- जल्दी समझदार बनो, अब ज्यादा नरमी नहीं बरतेंगे
articles.summary: ईरान ने अमेरिका के खिलाफ संयुक्त राष्ट्र सुरक्षा परिषद में शिकायत दर्ज कराई है. ईरान का आरोप है कि अमेरिका ने उसके एक जहाज को जब्त किया है, जिसे वह समुद्री डकैती मानता है.

hi.title: ट्रम्प की राइफल के साथ फोटो, ईरान को धमकी दी: बोले- जल्दी समझदार बनो, अब ज्यादा नरमी नहीं बरतेंगे

articles.title: कूटनीति तेज जयशंकर ने इक्वाडोर की विदेश मंत्री से की बातचीत
articles.summary: विदेश मंत्री एस जयशंकर ने इक्वाडोर की विदेश मंत्री से बातचीत की. दोनों देशों के बीच कूटनीतिक संबंधों को मजबूत करने पर चर्चा हुई. कूटनीति तेज जयशंकर ने इक्वाडोर की विदेश मंत्री से की बातचीत Patrika News।

articles.title: ईरान के स्कूल पर हमले को लेकर पेंटागन की चुप्पी, पूर्व अमेरिकी अधिकारियों ने उठाए सवाल
articles.summary: अमेरिका-इसराइल के ईरान से युद्ध की शुरुआत के दिन एक प्राइमरी स्कूल पर मिसाइल गिरी. इसमें 168 लोगों की मौत हुई, जिनमें क़रीब 110 बच्चे थे. पेंटागन ने इस हमले पर चुप्पी साध रखी है.

articles.title: दुनिया में उथल-पुथल के बीच भारत की कूटनीति; राजदूतों और उच्चायुक्तों के सम्मेलन में क्या बोले-एस
articles.summary: विदेश मंत्री एस जयशंकर ने राजदूतों और उच्चायुक्तों के सम्मेलन में कहा कि दुनिया में उथल-पुथल के बीच भारत अपनी कूटनीति को मजबूत कर रहा है। उन्होंने कहा कि भारत की कूटनीति देश के हितों की रक्षा और प्रचार के लिए काम कर रही है।

articles.title: ईरान-अमेरिका संघर्ष अभी सुलझा भी नहीं, दूसरे युद्ध की आहट; चीन ने भेजे दो-दो युद्धपोत
articles.summary: ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच संघर्ष अभी सुलझा नहीं है, वहीं चीन ने दो युद्धपोत भेजे हैं। यह कदम दूसरे युद्ध की आहट के रूप में देखा जा रहा है। चीन के इस कदम से क्षेत्र में तनाव बढ़ सकता है।

articles.title: 'और अच्छा आदमी बनने की जरूरत नहीं': ट्रंप ने हाथ में राइफल लेकर तस्वीर पोस्ट की, ईरान को दी नई

articles.title: IAF के अफसरों की तैनाती पर बनी सहमति, CDS चौहान की यात्रा से और क्या मिला?
articles.summary: भारत और इंग्लैंड ने भारतीय वायु सेना के अधिकारियों की तैनाती पर सहमति जताई है. सीडीएस जनरल अनिल चौहान की यात्रा के दौरान रक्षा सहयोग बढ़ाने पर 논의 हुई. दोनों देशों के बीच रक्षा संबंधों को मजबूत करने के प्रयास जारी हैं.

articles.summary: तेल की कीमतों में उछाल से चीनी की कीमत दो हफ्ते के उच्चतम स्तर पर पहुंच गई. ईरान-अमेरिका तनाव के कारण यह हुआ. बाजार में उतार-चढ़ाव जारी है. Iran America war: तेल की कीमतों में उछाल के चलते, 'राकेट' बनी चीनी की कीमत; दो हफ्ते के Highest Level पर भाव Jagran।
